final_prompt.prompt:
Create a detailed technical infographic showing the exploded view of a Sony A7 camera with all parts labeled by name.

Style/medium: clean technical illustration, exploded-view diagram for product education
Composition: center-weighted exploded view with camera body at center and components radiating outward in logical assembly order, clear callout lines connecting each part to its label
Subject: Sony A7 camera deconstructed — body shell, sensor assembly, shutter mechanism, mirror box, viewfinder, LCD screen, battery compartment, memory card slot, control dials, buttons, lens mount, grip, circuit boards, internal wiring
Scene/backdrop: neutral light gray gradient, generous breathing room around the exploded assembly
Lighting/medium: even soft studio lighting that reveals surface details without harsh shadows, technical clarity over drama
Color palette: neutral grays and metallic silvers with Sony's signature matte black body, subtle blue accents on circuit elements
Materials/textures: brushed aluminum, matte black polymer, glass sensor surface, rubberized grip texture
Text (verbatim): Sony A7 — all component names labeled in Spanish (sensor, obturador, montura E, visor electrónico, pantalla LCD, batería, tarjeta de memoria, dial de modo, botón de disparo, etc.)
Constraints: all major components visible and labeled, accurate Sony A7 proportions and part relationships, readable labels at standard viewing distance
Avoid: artistic flourishes, dramatic lighting, missing labels, incorrect part names, cluttered overlapping callout lines
